title: Activate Microsoft perpetual products using the Product Activation portal
license_note: Screenshots from support.microsoft.com. Confirm redistribution with your legal team before use in a shipped product.

steps.text: Personal Microsoft accounts
Work or school accounts
Microsoft Entra ID accounts
Azure Government tenant accounts
Open Product Activation portal , or go to: https://visualsupport.microsoft.com
Complete the Captcha.
Select Proceed to Sign In.
Enter your personal, work, or school account, and then select Next .
The account is not yet a Microsoft account, or
The account is configured as an Azure Government tenant (in this case, follow the steps in the Azure Government tenants below)
Select Get a new Microsoft account .
Complete the Captcha .
You will be redirected to the Create your Microsoft account experience.
Confirm the displayed email address, select Next , and complete the setup.
steps.caption: Account not registered steps

steps.text: Open Product Activation portal​​​​​​​ , or go to: https://visualsupport.microsoft.com
In the Government Tenants section, select the relevant tenant.
Enter your Microsoft Azure Government account's email address. It will automatically verify it.
Select Send One Time Password . This will send the password to the email account entered. The verification email will be sent from maccount@microsoft.com.
Collect the password from your email account, return to the Product Activation Portal, then enter the password and select Verify One Time Password .
Once successfully verified, select Proceed to Sign-In . ​​​​​​​
steps.caption: screenshot of PAportal_GovSignIn
